skill.name: canvas-design
skill.description: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this skill when the user asks to create a poster, piece of art, design, or other static piece. Create original visual designs, never copying existing artists' work to avoid copyright violations.
skill.summary: Create beautiful visual art in .png and .pdf documents using design philosophy. You should use this ...
skill.author: ZhanlinCui

security_audit.summary: Static scanner flagged 144 potential issues in font license files and SKILL.md. Evaluation reveals all findings are FALSE POSITIVES: font OFL.txt files contain standard SIL Open Font License text (URLs, 'Author' definitions, 'TERMINATION' sections) misidentified as security threats. SKILL.md contains instructional text about fonts, not code execution. Skill is a legitimate design tool with no malicious behavior.

dangerous_patterns.title: False Positive: Hardcoded URLs in Font Licenses
dangerous_patterns.description: Scanner flagged 'Hardcoded URL' in font OFL.txt files. These are legitimate URLs (openfontlicense.org) in standard SIL Open Font License files - required for proper font licensing.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: OFL.txt files are standard license files containing URLs to openfontlicense.org - this is expected and required for open-source fonts

dangerous_patterns.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
dangerous_patterns.description: Scanner flagged 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' at line 44 in multiple OFL.txt files. This is the word 'Author' in license definitions - not cryptographic code.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The word 'Author' in 'Author refers to any designer...' is standard license terminology, not cryptographic content

dangerous_patterns.title: False Positive: System Reconnaissance
dangerous_patterns.description: Scanner flagged 'System reconnaissance' at line 81 in OFL.txt files. This is the 'TERMINATION' section header in standard license text.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: 'TERMINATION' is a standard license section header indicating conditions under which the license terminates

dangerous_patterns.title: False Positive: Ruby/Shell Backtick Execution
dangerous_patterns.description: Scanner flagged 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' at SKILL.md:108. This is instructional text about using fonts from the canvas-fonts directory, not actual code.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The line contains text 'Search the ./canvas-fonts directory' - plain instructional text, not backtick execution syntax

content.value_statement: Generate professional visual art in PNG and PDF formats using design philosophy principles. Creates original artwork with expert craftsmanship, avoiding copyright issues.
actual_capabilities: Create visual art in PNG and PDF formats using design philosophy
Generate original artwork with expert craftsmanship and attention to detail
Apply design principles including form, space, color, composition, and visual hierarchy
Use bundled fonts from canvas-fonts directory for typography in artwork
Refine and polish artwork to museum-quality finish
limitations: Cannot create animated or interactive content
Output is limited to static PNG and PDF formats
Cannot access external fonts or design tools beyond bundled assets
Relies on canvas-based rendering which has some technical constraints

use_cases.title: Generate Original Poster Art
use_cases.description: Create unique poster designs with specific aesthetic movements and visual philosophies
use_cases.target_user: Graphic designers, marketing teams, artists needing custom poster designs

use_cases.title: Design Visual Art for Projects
use_cases.description: Produce original artwork for books, games, or creative projects without copyright concerns
use_cases.target_user: Game developers, authors, content creators seeking unique visuals

use_cases.title: Create Abstract Art Compositions
use_cases.description: Generate sophisticated abstract art with conceptual depth and artistic merit
use_cases.target_user: Art directors, creative professionals, anyone needing artistic visuals

prompt_templates.title: Create Simple Poster
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a visual art piece on canvas. The topic is [TOPIC]. Use a minimalist design philosophy with clean lines and limited color palette. Output as PNG.

prompt_templates.title: Design Abstract Art
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an original abstract art piece on canvas. Apply [DESIGN PHILOSOPHY] as the guiding aesthetic. Focus on color, form, and composition. Output as PDF.
prompt_templates.scenario: Abstract art with specific design philosophy

prompt_templates.title: Create Multi-Page Art Series
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a series of [NUMBER] visual art pages on canvas. Each should follow [PHILOSOPHY] but have distinct variations. They should tell a cohesive visual story. Output as multi-page PDF.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating a series of related artwork

prompt_templates.title: Refine Existing Artwork
prompt_templates.prompt: The current artwork is not perfect enough. Refine it to museum-quality masterpiece status. Make it crisp, polished, and meticulously crafted. Maintain the original design philosophy.

output_examples.input: Create a poster about environmental sustainability using organic design philosophy
output_examples.output: A visually striking PNG poster with flowing organic forms, earth-tone color palette, and minimal text. The design uses natural shapes and patterns to convey sustainability themes without explicit messaging.

output_examples.input: Generate abstract art with geometric silence philosophy
output_examples.output: A grid-based composition with precise geometric shapes, stark contrast between filled and empty space, and small typographic elements. The result feels architectural and meditative.

best_practices: Provide clear design philosophy or allow the skill to generate one based on your topic
Request refinements specifically mentioning quality standards like museum-quality or masterpiece
Specify format preferences (PNG for single images, PDF for multi-page or print-ready)
Mention target context (poster for venue, book cover, magazine spread) to guide aesthetic choices
anti_patterns: Requesting specific copyrighted characters or artistic styles that would violate copyright
Asking for photorealistic images (skill creates abstract/design-oriented art)
Requesting animation or interactive elements (skill produces static outputs only)
Providing overly detailed content descriptions that leave no room for artistic interpretation

faq.question: What file formats does this skill output?
faq.answer: The skill outputs PNG and PDF formats. Use PNG for web-friendly images and PDF for print-ready or multi-page documents.

faq.question: Can I request specific copyrighted characters?
faq.answer: No. The skill creates original visual designs and explicitly avoids copying existing artists' work to prevent copyright violations.

faq.question: How does the design philosophy work?
faq.answer: The skill generates a design philosophy (aesthetic movement) that guides the visual creation. You can provide a topic and the skill develops a philosophical approach then expresses it visually.

faq.question: Can I refine the artwork if it's not perfect?
faq.answer: Yes. Tell the skill it needs to be pristine or museum-quality, and it will refine the work with more attention to crispness and craftsmanship.

faq.question: What fonts are available?
faq.answer: The skill includes bundled open-source fonts in the canvas-fonts directory. These are used for any text elements in the artwork.

faq.question: Can this skill create multi-page documents?
faq.answer: Yes. When requested, the skill can create multiple pages that follow the same design philosophy while having distinct variations that tell a cohesive visual story.
